title: Section 34
content: 1[The councillors and the persons referred to in clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3] shall be entitled to receive allowances for attendance at meetings of the Corporation and of any of its committees at such rate as may be determined by rules made in this behalf.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 67 of 1993, s. 31, for "the councillors and the alderman" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).
